advert.description: The advertisement features children in a play area. The last frame shows a girl putting on a hat/dress, transitioning to the next ad scene.
The ad combines cinema themes with the Comparethemarket logo. The last frame displays the '2 FOR 1' offer text and logo just before the Vax vacuum ad begins.

The ad showcases a Vax Blade 4 vacuum. The last frame shows a finger pointing at a digital menu board (likely KFC) indicating the transition to the next commercial, meaning this frame is the end of the Vax ad.

advert.brand: Kfc original recipe deal by Kentucky fried chick
advert.description: The ad shows a digital interaction for ordering food. The last frame is a red screen with the KFC logo and 'ORDER NOW' text, followed by the Warburtons ad.
The ad follows a man obsessed with toasties. The last frame shows him sitting at a table about to eat a Warburton's toastie, with the slogan 'BAKERS, BORN AND BREED'.

advert.brand: Cancer research race for life by Cancer research uk
advert.description: The ad is for the 'Race for Life' charity. The last frame shows the 'Race for Life' logo and sponsor logos including Cancer Research UK and Standard Life.
The ad features a man rolling in a giant coin. The last visible frame of the ad shows the 'Poundland pounds more' logo before the channel ident appears.
